unit.note: Change isolated to plugins/shipwright-security (finalizer + tests + 1 SKILL.md line). Directly measured: security plugin 477 passed / 3 skipped; shared/tests 4949 passed / 15 skipped; compliance audit_snapshot 18 passed. Full 18-unit canonical F0 runner not re-run for every plugin — no shared or other-plugin code changed, so these broad suites cover the blast radius. Skips are missing-scanner-binary (security) + environment (shared), which hard-fail in CI.

integration.note: real update_compliance subprocess drift-guard (test_finalize_real_update_compliance_leaves_clean_tree) exercises producer->finalizer->git end to end

e2e.note: surface=none (internal git tooling, no web/API/UI); justified at F0.5

degraded.detail: No GPT/Gemini API keys in this environment — plan + external_code review closed not_run (degraded); self/code/doubt review done inline.

surface_verification.justification: Internal git-committing finalize tooling: no web/API/interactive surface; grade_snapshot schema the WebUI reads is unchanged. Real E2E behavior covered by the real-subprocess drift-guard test at F0.

behaviors.behavior: full write-set staged -> clean tree after commit
commit carries events.jsonl + config + triage (not just MDs)
event-only regen (MDs unchanged) still commits, no dirty leak
direct append to tracked triage.jsonl (no-origin) is staged
gitignored events.jsonl -> no git add error, tree clean
genuinely empty regen -> no commit, tree clean
re-run records its own snapshot; never leaves dirty tree
real producer -> finalizer leaves clean tree (drift guard)
standalone / CI env -> no-op (unchanged skip contract)

enumeration_basis.note: fix requirements: stage events.jsonl, stage config, stage triage.jsonl, correct false idempotency doc — all covered
